zones.name: Cebu City Core (Fuente-Colon-Carbon)

zones.notes: Major intermodal transfer and mall terminal zone.

zones.notes: Dense commercial corridor and transfer demand.

zones.notes: High commuter volume from office and BPO concentration.

zones.notes: Northbound corridor load toward Mandaue/Cebu City.

zones.notes: South corridor with sustained commuter flows.

zones.notes: Bridge crossing and airport-side access demand.

zones.notes: Regional transfer node along north corridor.
